mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender FROM student s INNER JOIN student_course_schedule scs ON s.id = scs.student_id INNER JOIN course_schedule cs ON scs.course_schedule_id = cs.id WHERE cs.id = #{courseScheduleId}

SELECT * FROM student
AND student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNo}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM student ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_no=#{studentNo}, name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, age=#{age}, class_id=#{classId}, phone=#{phone}, address=#{address}, enroll_date=#{enroll_date},avatar = #{avatar}, fdf = #{fdf} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student WHERE (#{studentNo} IS NULL OR student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNo}, '%')) AND (#{name} IS NULL OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE (#{studentNo} IS NULL OR student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNo}, '%')) AND (#{name} IS NULL OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%'))
